coding.display: Comprehensive metabolic 2000 panel - Serum or Plasma

performer.display: The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center

conclusion: Partial CMP results reported. Creatinine 0.92 mg/dL, ALT 22 U/L, AST 24 U/L, Albumin 3.1 g/dL. Renal and hepatic function within acceptable limits for continued chemotherapy. Albumin mildly low at 3.1, consistent with chronic illness and malignancy.
